{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Grand Patriarch’s tomb
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Grand Patriarch]]'s tomb contains the [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] and possibly his corpse.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The Remnant was sealed in the Grand Patriarch’s tomb. “And the corpse?” “Pardon this one’s insufficient knowledge, elder. This one presumes the corpse is still inside with the Remnant.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
